title: Auth Provider Interface Abstraction
purpose: Create an IdentityProvider port so Supabase Auth is replaceable. No domain code depends on Supabase SDK semantics.
architectural_constraints: Interface in application/ports, implementation in infrastructure/auth
Supabase SDK isolated to infrastructure layer only
JWT verification via JWKS, not SDK-dependent
Domain errors for auth failures, not Supabase errors
acceptance_criteria: IdentityProvider interface has verifyToken, getUser, revokeSessions methods
JWT verification works with Supabase JWKS endpoint
Domain error thrown on invalid token (not SDK error leaked)

failure_modes.mitigation: Retry with backoff, fallback to cached key
